title: telemetry-logs — retention windows
description: No data store owned. Retention lives with the sink (Loki, DataDog, file rotation, etc).
compliance_regimes_referenced: gdpr Art. 5 (storage limitation — sink must comply)
gdpr Art. 30 (records of processing — workspace_id + workspace_id in log records count)

hot.description: sink-defined. Loki default 30d, DataDog default 15d free / 15 months paid, file rotation config'd via config('logging.channels.stack.days')
